chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Obligatory in Cases of ifda' (causing Reproductive rupture)

text: قَضَى أَمِيرُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ فِي اِمْرَأَةٍ أُفْضِيَتْ بِالدِّيَةِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: The Commander of the Faithful (as) ruled in the case of a woman who was harmed through Ifdaʾ (a severe injury during intercourse that causes damage) that full blood money (diyyah) is due.
